characters.name: 제시
characters.body: A full body shot of a slender Korean woman with an hourglass silhouette and soft muscular tone. She has delicate shoulders, narrow collarbones, and elegant proportions. She is leaning forward slightly with her upper body inclined, creating a dynamic yet graceful posture. Her arms are positioned downward, supporting her weight against a surface, which highlights the curve of her back and the natural drape of her floral sundress. The pose captures a candid, leaning-over motion with a balanced distribution of body weight.

characters.name: 선화
characters.body: A full-body side profile of a Korean woman with a refined hourglass silhouette. She has a slim waist, high-set hips, and toned glutes accentuated by tight-fitting grey skinny jeans. Her posture is elegant and upright as she stands by a chalkboard, one arm extended as if writing. The silhouette emphasizes a graceful S-curve from her back to her lower body, conveying a professional yet athletic and well-proportioned physique.
characters.style: confident athletic presence, energetic and vibrant aura

characters.name: 지수1
characters.body: A slim yet curvaceous Korean woman with a pronounced hourglass figure, featuring a narrow waist and full hips. She is wearing a tight-fitting, long-sleeved brown mini dress that accentuates her body contours with horizontal shirring and ruched details. She stands in a frontal pose, slightly tilting her hips to the side to emphasize the silhouette, with one hand resting naturally on her thigh. The posture is elegant and confident, highlighting a balanced body proportion.
characters.style: perfectly managed sophisticated look, confident presence
